Suspicious mole on upper back, ABCDE criteria met.

**Plan**
1. Excisional biopsy of the mole on the right upper back.
2. Pathology results to follow; patient will be personally contacted with results.
3. Patient instructed to avoid aspirin and ibuprofen for three days prior to the procedure.
4. Patient instructed to wear a loose-fitting top.
5. Patient instructed to keep the site clean and dry for 24 hours post-procedure.
6. Patient instructed to shower normally post-procedure.
7. Patient recommended monthly self-skin checks using the ABCDE criteria.
8. Patient recommended annual full skin exams with a dermatologist.
9. Patient counseled on daily sunscreen use (SPF 30 or higher, reapplying every two hours when outdoors, using hats and protective clothing when possible).
